ccache /home/test/zephyr-sdk-0.17.4/arm-zephyr-eabi/bin/arm-zephyr-eabi-gcc CMakeFiles/zephyr_pre1.dir/misc/empty_file.c.obj CMakeFiles/zephyr_pre1.dir/dev_handles.c.obj -o zephyr_pre1.elf  CMakeFiles/offsets.dir/arch/arm/core/offsets/offsets.c.obj -fuse-ld=bfd -Wl,-T linker_zephyr_pre1.cmd -Wl,-Map=/home/test/Desktop/projects/mecanum_nucleo/mecanum/build/zephyr/zephyr_pre1.map -Wl,--whole-archive ../app/libapp.a libzephyr.a arch/common/libarch__common.a arch/arch/arm/core/aarch32/libarch__arm__core__aarch32.a arch/arch/arm/core/aarch32/cortex_m/libarch__arm__core__aarch32__cortex_m.a arch/arch/arm/core/aarch32/mpu/libarch__arm__core__aarch32__mpu.a lib/libc/minimal/liblib__libc__minimal.a lib/posix/liblib__posix.a soc/arm/common/cortex_m/libsoc__arm__common__cortex_m.a drivers/interrupt_controller/libdrivers__interrupt_controller.a drivers/clock_control/libdrivers__clock_control.a drivers/counter/libdrivers__counter.a drivers/console/libdrivers__console.a drivers/gpio/libdrivers__gpio.a drivers/pwm/libdrivers__pwm.a drivers/serial/libdrivers__serial.a drivers/timer/libdrivers__timer.a drivers/pinctrl/libdrivers__pinctrl.a ../modules/stm32/stm32cube/lib..__modules__hal__stm32__stm32cube.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive kernel/libkernel.a -L"/home/test/zephyr-sdk-0.17.4/arm-zephyr-eabi/bin/../lib/gcc/arm-zephyr-eabi/12.2.0/thumb/v7e-m+fp/hard" -L/home/test/Desktop/projects/mecanum_nucleo/mecanum/build/zephyr -lgcc arch/common/libisr_tables.a -no-pie -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mabi=aapcs -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfp16-format=ieee -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--build-id=none -Wl,--sort-common=descending -Wl,--sort-section=alignment -Wl,-u,_OffsetAbsSyms -Wl,-u,_ConfigAbsSyms -nostdlib -static -Wl,-X -Wl,-N -Wl,--orphan-handling=warn
